excluded: a claim that PhaseWrap-RoPE replaces RoPE
a claim that learned pointer-generation is equivalent to full decoder-only language-model validation
a claim that output-path capacity evidence is positional-method promotion evidence
supported: A no-credential two-block learned pointer-generator capacity audit over the support-complete row family.
Evidence about whether a learned copy/vocab mixture preserves the Stage 63 copy-output capacity repair.

decision.claim_boundary: The learned copy/vocab mixture establishes train capacity but does not generalize all retrieval lanes.

model.trained_parameters: token embeddings, two q/k/v/o attention blocks, vocab output projection, positional scale, copy/vocab gate
model.value_output_mode: learned mixture of vocab softmax and copied prefix-token mass
